extensionName.message: GridForge Pro · AI 表格完美复制工具
extensionName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and browser toolbar

extensionDescription.message: 网页小插件：一键复制 AI 表格，完美保留格式，直接粘贴到 Word / WPS
extensionDescription.description: Short description shown in the Chrome Web Store

copyButton.description: Label on the copy button injected into AI tables

copySuccessBordered.description: Feedback shown after copying a table with borders

copySuccessBorderless.description: Feedback shown after copying a table without borders (Alt+click)

copySuccessPlain.description: Feedback when only plain-text copy succeeded (writeText fallback)

copyFailed.description: Feedback when all copy methods failed

copyAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the injected copy button

themeDark.description: Label on the theme toggle when dark mode is active

themeLight.description: Label on the theme toggle when light mode is active

toggleAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the dark/light theme toggle button

step1Text.message: 点击 AI 表格右上角的「复制」按钮，复制带框线表格。
step1Text.description: Instruction step 1 (rendered as innerHTML; contains safe span/b markup)

step2Text.message: 按住 Alt（Windows）/ Option（Mac）键同时点击「复制」按钮，复制无框线表格。
step2Text.description: Instruction step 2 (rendered as innerHTML; contains safe span/b markup)
